benchmark_comparison.context: Sprint A-1 baseline — unoptimized. US Study 1A also started at similar baseline before B-series sprints lifted it to 86.1%. India optimization begins here.

in07_strong_leader.issue: 100% D ('very bad') vs Pew A=44%+B=38% saying it is GOOD. Haiku defaults to Western liberal anti-authoritarian stance. India's BJP supporters value strong centralized leadership — inverse of Western default.
in07_strong_leader.fix: Dedicated strong_leader_stance in system prompt for bjp_supporter/bjp_lean personas

in12_wife_obedience.issue: 77% C + 23% D (disagree wife should obey) vs Pew A=64% agree. INVERTED. Haiku applies Western gender equality norms. Actual Indian public opinion: 87% agreed in Religion survey.
in12_wife_obedience.fix: Explicit gender_norms_stance calibrated to Indian traditional family values for traditional personas

in13_gender_jobs.issue: 0% A (agree men should have job priority) vs Pew A=47%. INVERTED — same Western default.

in01_democracy_satisfaction.issue: 90% C ('not too satisfied') vs Pew 72% satisfied (A+B). BJP supporter current_conditions_stance says 'very satisfied with democracy' but it is not routing to A/B correctly.
in01_democracy_satisfaction.fix: Option-calibrated anchors in BJP current_conditions_stance (same B-10 pattern)

in02_modi_approval.issue: 0% A vs Pew A=56% ('very favorable'). bjp_supporter/bjp_lean personas should overwhelmingly choose A.

in04_inc_approval.issue: 0% responses — complete parse failure. No persona returned a parseable letter for this question.
in04_inc_approval.fix: Check question format and options in questions_india.json

sprint_roadmap.A-2_priority_1: Gender norms calibration — in12/in13 are INVERTED (13%, 20%). Add gender_norms_stance to CoreMemory, calibrated by political_lean and religion. Traditional Hindu/BJP personas must reflect actual Indian attitudes on family roles.
sprint_roadmap.A-2_priority_2: Strong leader calibration — in07 INVERTED (10.2%). BJP supporters should favor strong leadership explicitly in system prompt.
sprint_roadmap.A-3: Approval rating anchors — in01/in02/in03 gap. Option-vocabulary calibration (B-10 pattern) for democracy satisfaction and Modi/BJP approval.
sprint_roadmap.A-4: in04 parse failure investigation and fix.
sprint_roadmap.A-5: in08/in09 economic conditions and government trust calibration.

pew_data_source: Pew Global Attitudes 2023, Religion in India 2021, Gender Roles 2022, Global Attitudes 2017/2018

simulatte_results.json.description: Full per-question distributions, Pew India baselines, and sample responses
